steps.title: Match the leading coefficient
steps.content: The expression $0.36x^2 + 0.63x + 1.17$ equals $a(4x^2 + 7x + 13)$. Expanding the right side gives $4ax^2 + 7ax + 13a$. For the $x^2$ terms to match, we need: $$0.36 = 4a$$

steps.title: Solve for a
steps.content: Divide both sides by 4 to isolate $a$: $$a = \frac{0.36}{4} = 0.09$$ The value of $a$ is \$0.09$.
